'''Freda''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] within the [[Freda system/Legends|Freda system]], located near [[Jante]] on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and home to the [[Freda (species)|Freda]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it was under the control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Planet-stub}}
